title: Flaky Indulgent Korean Cheonggukjang Flatbread
description: A citrusy and flaky Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring cheonggukjang and ferment-jang, made with whole30-friendly ingredients. This flatbread is perfect for a snack or light lunch.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, cheonggukjang, ferment-jang, salt, and black pepper.
Add coconut oil, lemon juice, and egg to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Place the flatbreads on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the flatbreads for 15 minutes, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
Remove the flatbreads from the oven and let them cool for 5 minutes before serving.
